title: Technical Lead [Backend Systems, JAVA] - WCAN
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Design and evaluate scalable, secure, and fault-tolerant systems, incorporating multi-region disaster recovery and ensuring robust data consistency.
  • Offer domain expertise and guidance across teams, facilitating cross-functional architectural discussions.
  • Convert complex business requirements into scalable technical solutions that align with long-term product and company objectives.
  • Develop high-quality, reusable components and establish best practices to enhance efficiency across teams.
  • Establish and implement domain-level standards, governance frameworks, and process improvements, including microservice design, observability, and code quality.
  • Mentor engineers, promote knowledge sharing, and foster a culture of continuous learning and innovation.


Qualifications:

  • Holds a Bachelor's degree in Computing, Software Engineering, IT, or a related field.
  • Over 8 years of experience in backend system design and development, with a proven record of delivering mission-critical systems.
  • Strong expertise in Java or Go, with in-depth knowledge of backend frameworks (e.g., Spring Boot, WebFlux), messaging systems (e.g., Kafka), and distributed databases (SQL/NoSQL, Redis, etc.).
  • Skilled in designing and scaling large distributed systems with a focus on performance, availability, security, and resilience.
  • Capable of defining and implementing engineering standards and technical guidelines at the system or domain level.
  • Continuously evaluates and integrates new technologies to enhance systems and processes.
  • Anticipates edge cases and long-term impacts, incorporating robustness, observability, and compliance from the design stage.
  • Effectively drives adoption of best practices and standards across teams and stakeholders.
  • Makes informed, strategic decisions backed by technical expertise and business impact analysis.


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
